question: Give me gastric cancer related research
natural_question: Give me gastric cancer related research
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Trial phase", "Total sample size", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
